raw_response:
Le composant `<Sidebar>` est défini dans `apps/web/components/Sidebar.tsx` et importé par **15 pages** :

| Fichier | Composant |
|---|---|
| `apps/web/app/audit/page.tsx` | `AuditPage` |
| `apps/web/app/billing/page.tsx` | `BillingPage` |
| `apps/web/app/dashboard/page.tsx` | `DashboardPage` |
| `apps/web/app/forgot-password/page.tsx` | `ForgotPasswordPage` |
| `apps/web/app/invite/page.tsx` | `InvitePage` |
| `apps/web/app/login/page.tsx` | `LoginPage` |
| `apps/web/app/members/page.tsx` | `MembersPage` |
| `apps/web/app/notifications/page.tsx` | `NotificationsPage` |
| `apps/web/app/pricing/page.tsx` | `PricingPage` |
| `apps/web/app/profile/page.tsx` | `ProfilePage` |
| `apps/web/app/reports/page.tsx` | `ReportsPage` |
| `apps/web/app/sessions/page.tsx` | `SessionsPage` |
| `apps/web/app/settings/page.tsx` | `SettingsPage` |
| `apps/web/app/signup/page.tsx` | `SignupPage` |
| `apps/web/app/webhooks/page.tsx` | `WebhooksPage` |

Toutes ces pages se trouvent sous `apps/web/app/` et utilisent `<Sidebar>` dans leur rendu.
